result.stdout:
Usage:
  extractpo <INPUT_PATH> <OUTPUT_PATH> [options]

Arguments:
  <INPUT_PATH> The path to the input directory, all projects at the the path will be processed.
  <OUTPUT_PATH> The path to a directory where POT files will be generated.

Options:
  -l, --language <C#|VB>                 Specifies the code language to extracts translatable strings from.
                                         Default: C# language
  -t, --template <Razor|Liquid>          Specifies the template engine to extract the translatable strings from.
                                         Default: Razor & Liquid templates
  -i, --ignore project1,project2         Ignores extracting PO filed from a given project(s).
  --localizer localizer1,localizer2      Specifies the name of the localizer(s) that will be used during the extraction process.
  -s, --single <FILE_NAME>               Specifies the single output file.
